rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The guard checks `config.decompose?.enabled === false` (strict equality with boolean `false`). Undefined/null does NOT trigger fallback — the config must explicitly set `enabled: false`.","scope":"feature flags"},{"kind":"convention","text":"When adding a new top-level config section, include it in `kody.config.json` itself so the engine's own config is self-consistent and `config.decompose?.enabled` resolves at runtime.","scope":"config"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"The engine version (`@kody-ade/engine@0.4.4`) ships the guard already — the task only needed to populate the config key to make it operational, not implement the guard.","scope":"engine integration"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The feature flag is boolean — `enabled: false` means fallback, `enabled: true` (or absent with `=== false` check) means normal decompose behavior.","scope":"feature flags"}]}
